chime.description: This is a soft, melodic chime sound effect perfect for signaling a gentle transition or a lighthearted moment in a video.

click-soft.description: This is a smooth, medium-energy swoosh sound effect, perfect for transitioning between two scenes or highlighting a sleek reveal.

click.description: This is a sharp, medium-energy digital "whoosh" effect that works perfectly for a quick transition between video clips.

error.description: This is a sharp, medium-energy digital glitch sound that serves as an effective, abrupt transition for a video cut or error screen.

glitch-1.description: This is a high-energy, distorted digital impact sound effect that works perfectly for a sudden reveal or a punchy transition in a fast-paced edit.

glitch-2.description: This is a harsh, distorted digital glitch effect with high energy that serves as a jarring transition or a chaotic digital reveal.

glitch-3.description: This is a low-energy, subtle electronic click sound effect that works well as a minimal audio transition or a UI element for a subtle selection reveal.

impact-bass-1.description: This is a medium-energy, sharp electronic chime that works perfectly as an accent for a quick transition or a brief, high-tech visual reveal.

impact-bass-2.description: This sound effect is a shimmering, ethereal synth riser with a medium energy level, perfect for creating anticipation before a magical transition or reveal.

key-press.description: This is a medium-energy, distorted digital impact sound effect that works well for a sudden glitch transition or a glitchy text reveal.

notification.description: This is a medium-energy, whimsical digital transition sound effect that fits perfectly with a playful visual reveal or a cute UI interaction.

ping.description: This is a medium-energy, sharp electronic impact sound that works perfectly for punchy transitions or highlighting key on-screen reveals.

pop.description: This is a medium-energy, metallic clinking sound that works perfectly as an accent or a subtle impact for a precise visual reveal or UI element.

riser.description: This is a high-energy cinematic air whoosh transition that builds tension before suddenly cutting, making it perfect for a dramatic scene change or a quick reveal.

sparkle.description: This is a bright, high-energy "whoosh" transition sound with a fast, ascending pitch that is perfect for a rapid scene change or a quick reveal.

typing.description: This is a hard, high-pitched "ding" sound that works well as an accent for a reveal or a quick transition.

whoosh-cinematic.description: This is a medium-energy, cinematic whoosh effect, ideal for smooth scene transitions or emphasizing a quick reveal.

whoosh-short.description: This is a medium-energy, organic wooden texture sound effect that works well as a subtle transition or a background accent.

whoosh.description: This is a hard, metallic impact sound effect that works well for a sudden reveal or a punchy transition.
